summary: Iteration 178: Backend refactoring regression testing completed successfully. Verified server.py decomposition from 6068 to 426 lines with code extracted to 6 new modules (services/report_quality.py, services/pipeline_orchestrator.py, services/report_generator.py, services/barrister_generator.py, routers/reports.py, routers/report_exports.py). All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py successfully reduced from 6068 to 426 lines - clean orchestrator pattern
All routers properly mounted: reports_router, report_exports_router included in app
CORS middleware correctly configured with CORS_ORIGINS env var
SecurityHeadersMiddleware adds X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection headers
DocumentScanner component correctly hidden on web platform (isNativePlatform() check)
Session token authentication working (session_token field, not token)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 178 verified backend refactoring with no regressions. Key findings: (1) All health endpoints working: /api/health, /api/ready, /api/health/deep, (2) Login flow working with session_token (not token), (3) Cases listing and detail pages working, (4) Reports endpoints working: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports, GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/barrister-view, (5) Export endpoints exist: /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/export-pdf, /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/export-docx, (6) DocumentScanner correctly hidden on web (only renders on native Capacitor platforms), (7) All routers properly mounted in server.py, (8) Security headers present in responses. Test case: case_d294f503192a (R v Homann, NSW).
